g.text: Single-fibre geometry spans distinct remaining-area responses

text.style: fill: #6d7378; font: 6.5px 'TeX Gyre Termes', serif; text-anchor: end

g.text: Curves are geometric A/A0 nodes; dashed is the Rθ = 1 − θ comparator only.

g.text: Native COMSOL bare-area fraction = Rθ × pore transmissivity (not plotted).
